name: Mock Mince Meat (for the Meatless Eaters)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put water and raisins in a pot.
2. Cook for a few minutes.
3. Add sugar, molasses, vinegar, butter, egg, cracker crumbs, cinnamon, cloves, allspice, nutmeg, salt, and pepper to the pot.
4. Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
5. Stir in the brandy.
